title: Obviously Optimized
description: Obviously Optimized is like giving Minecraft a double shot of espresso—faster loading, smoother frames, and less lag, all without messing with the classic vibe.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eba432c99c163ac2d1b96a195fd668d745ab0cd0.png)
## Why You Should Download Obviously Optimized
Obviously Optimized is a modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience by offering a collection of smart performance improvements and quality-of-life tweaks. Whether you're playing on a high-end machine or a more modest setup, this modpack ensures smooth gameplay with minimal lag while introducing useful, subtle adjustments to make your time in Minecraft more enjoyable.
## Features
Performance-Focused: With mods that reduce lag, improve frame rates, and optimize game performance, you’ll enjoy smoother gameplay even on lower-end systems.

Balanced Gameplay: All tweaks are designed to keep the game feeling natural, without altering the core Minecraft experience.

Perfect for players who want a better-performing game without sacrificing the immersive feel of Minecraft.

#### Bonus! If you Go to the Discord Server you get to try a Special Version Of The Pack!

#### To get the full immerse, Go into Resource Packs and enable them all or to your liking.

## Other Notes
If you do want to use Obviously Optimized as a base in your own mod pack, feel free to do so, just make sure to include credit (a link back to this page works).
